summary: Made the Kanban dispatch + web-chat actually work in the live app; the loop then autonomously self-implemented further V1d on its own fitting (proof it works).
fixed_and_vision_verified: Move-to-Plan dispatches a REAL gateway turn over /chat/stream; card advances (plan->implement) — no 'fetch failed'. Root causes fixed: 5-min turn timeout (thread timeoutMs + disable server requestTimeout + stream so undici headersTimeout can't fire), transient transport failures now REVERT (not park), verdict parsing tolerates gateway status badges.
Open web chat on a Discuss card navigates the Garrison shell to /embed/web-channel-default (James mode + card context) via postMessage — the relative-href-wrong-origin bug is fixed.
loop_self_implemented: the dispatched card reached Implement; the scheduler tick ran autothing-implement via the operative, which added lastDispatchError badge + Retry, /board/runtime web-channel discovery, styles — coherent, builds.

blockers: Exhaustive per-agent-list live verification (running a real multi-minute autothing-* turn through every one of the 8 agent lists) was not run to completion — it needs hours of real operative turns; the uniform dispatch mechanism is proven on Plan with vision.
The kanban loop's own operative concurrently edited the kanban fitting (the dispatched V1d cards drove autothing-implement on it); paused the tick to verify as sole editor, then restored it.
